__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus scraping the copilot premium exporter

title: GitHub Enterprise — AI Usage by Model

targets.expr: sum(github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum(github_premium_request_usage_gross_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum(github_premium_request_usage_discount_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum(github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / 0.01
$budget_credits - (sum(github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / 0.01)

panels.title: Projected Month-End (linear)
panels.description: Naive linear extrapolation of current burn.

targets.expr: sum(github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / scalar(day_of_month()) * scalar(days_in_month())

panels.title: Budget Utilization
panels.description: Consumed credits as % of monthly budget.

targets.expr: 100 * (sum(github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / 0.01) / $budget_credits
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_gross_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})

panels.title: Per-Model Cost & Usage Breakdown
panels.description: All AI usage metrics for every model in the selected period.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_gross_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_discount_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_discount_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
avg by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_price_per_unit{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_gross_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / 0.01
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})

panels.title: Price per Unit by Model
panels.description: Cost per request — exposes the wide per-model spread.

targets.expr: avg by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_price_per_unit{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_discount_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})

100 * sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_discount_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}) / clamp_min(sum by (model) (github_premium_request_usage_gross_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"}), 0.0001)

panels.title: Net Spend by SKU (over time)
panels.description: Works even when the model label is empty (general billing endpoint).

targets.expr: sum by (sku) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})

panels.title: Spend by SKU (model-agnostic)
panels.description: Robust fallback dimension — populated even when the model field is empty.

targets.expr: sum by (sku) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
sum by (sku) (github_premium_request_usage_net_quantity{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", year=~"$year", month=~"$month"})
github_premium_request_scrape_success
time() - github_premium_request_last_scrape_timestamp_seconds
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(github_premium_request_scrape_duration_seconds_bucket[10m])) by (le))

panels.title: Scrape Failures (1h)
panels.description: Failed fetches in the last hour.

targets.expr: increase(github_premium_request_scrape_failures_total[1h])
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(github_premium_request_scrape_duration_seconds_bucket[10m])) by (le))

panels.title: Net Spend by Month
panels.description: Compare total net spend across billing months.

targets.expr: sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: AI Credits by Month
panels.description: Compare total credits consumed across billing months.

targets.expr: sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"}) / 0.01
sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_gross_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"})
sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"})
sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_discount_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"})
sum by (year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"}) / 0.01

panels.title: Net Spend by Model — Month Comparison
panels.description: Per-model spend broken down by billing month.

targets.expr: sum by (model, year, month) (github_premium_request_usage_net_amount{type=~"$entity_type", name=~"$entity", product=~"$product", sku=~"$sku", model=~"$model"})
